reasoning: Genuinely prospective — registered 2026-03-23 before the next G3+ event. However, this prediction carries a critical credibility problem: it REPLACES the falsified W027/PRED-R006 which predicted the OPPOSITE effect (Schumann amplitude ELEVATION during G3+ storms). The dome has reversed its prediction after falsification. Published literature (e.g., analyses of geomagnetic storm effects on Schumann resonance in Mexico, ScienceDirect 2019) generally shows amplitude ENHANCEMENT during storms, not suppression, as ionospheric perturbations pump energy into the cavity. The prediction reversal — from enhancement to suppression — actually moves AWAY from the more commonly observed effect. The ≥30% threshold and 6-hour window are specific enough to be testable, but the open-ended test window ('next G3 event') makes this indefinitely pending. We note the prediction for tracking but flag the reversal pattern.
